configuration.compileOnSave.enabled.mark: Always update the compiled PDF when a file is saved.
configuration.compileOutputFolderName.ma: The name of the folder where the compiled output files (e.g., `output.pdf`) is located. (Take effect after restarting VSCode)
configuration.pdfViewer.themes.markdownD: Configure the color themes used by the PDF viewer. (Take effect after restarting VSCode)
configuration.pdfViewer.themes.fontColor: The font color of the theme.
configuration.pdfViewer.themes.backgroun: The background color of the theme.
configuration.pdfViewer.defaultScrollMod: Configure the default scroll mode used by the PDF viewer for new state. Existing saved viewer state takes precedence.
configuration.pdfViewer.defaultSpreadMod: Configure the default spread mode used by the PDF viewer for new state. Existing saved viewer state takes precedence.
Show an inline reference preview popover when clicking citation links in the PDF viewer.
Maximum number of citation links to include in one PDF citation preview carousel.
Maximum number of PDF text lines to show for each citation reference preview.
Maximum number of characters to show for each citation reference preview.
configuration.agentReview.enabled.markdo: **(Beta feature, off by default)** Cursor-style Agent Review. When **on**, codex / claude agents edit via reviewable drafts that you accept or decline in a VS Code diff viewer, and `AGENTS.md` / `CLAUDE.md` get a managed block teaching agents to use the helper. When **off**, the managed block is removed, in-flight drafts are aborted, and agent edits save + sync directly. This setting is the single source of truth; older per-replica `enableAgentReview` metadata is ignored and removed during settings normalization. Restart your codex / claude session after toggling so the agent re-reads `AGENTS.md` / `CLAUDE.md`.
configuration.invisibleMode.historyRefre: The interval (in seconds) to refresh the project history in invisible mode, which is used to update the file changes, collaborator status, etc.
configuration.invisibleMode.chatMessageR: The interval (in seconds) to refresh the chat messages in invisible mode.
configuration.invisibleMode.inactiveTime: The timeout (in seconds) to mark a online Collaborator as inactivate in invisible mode.
configuration.auth.browserPath.markdownD: Path to a Chrome, Edge, or Chromium executable used for browser login. Leave empty to auto-detect.
configuration.auth.browserLogin.timeoutS: Maximum time, in seconds, to wait for browser login to complete.
